scripts.start: concurrently -k -n "WEB,API,SCHED" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web -- -p 3001" "uvicorn main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --port 8000" "python main.py schedule --db"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "WEB,API" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web -- -p 3001" "uvicorn main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --port 8000"
scripts.db: docker compose up -d postgres redis elasticsearch
scripts.install-deps: pip install -r apps/worker/requirements.txt && pip install -r apps/api/requirements.txt && npm install --prefix apps/web
